what_it_does: It stores a channel attachment metadata record: it declares an attachment id, the channel it belongs to, an attachment_type of board_items, a target board://item-15f21a74, and an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter; there is no body content.
The attachment is typed as board_items and targets board://item-15f21a74.
It is associated with the dragnet-development channel.
The filename att-3a714a16.md matches the id in the frontmatter.
standouts: Typed link to a board item via board://item-15f21a74.
Precise ISO 8601 added timestamp with timezone.
conventions: Attachment filename mirrors the id field.
References a board item with a board:// URI scheme.
Records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format with explicit timezone offset.
concerns: No payload or descriptive content beyond metadata.
Target board item is referenced only by opaque URI; no title or context provided.
Timestamp is dated 2026, which may be future-dated relative to ingestion time.
No author or provenance field is present.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that records a board-item link for the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or action does board://item-15f21a74 represent?
Where is the actual board-item payload or attachment content stored?
Is the 2026 timestamp intentional or a data-entry error?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped, typed association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for traceability.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to reference a target board item within a channel attachment ledger.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped, typed association between an attachment identifier and a board item in the dragnet-development channel, supporting traceability of board-item attachments.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment metadata record (att-3a714a16) of type board_items that links the dragnet-development channel to board item board://item-15f21a74 and records when it was added.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to record that a board-item attachment was added to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
